# GoodToCode Agent Framework Quick-start

> Official .NET and Blazor quick-start template for Microsoft Agent Framework.

## Primary Pages
- Home: /
- Chat: /chat

## Public API Endpoints
- /api/chat
- /api/actor

## Metadata & Structured Data
- Open Graph and Twitter card metadata are provided for public pages.
- JSON-LD types include: Template, Chat, Actor, BreadcrumbList, Organization.

## Media Rules
- Use direct, public image URLs.
- Supported formats: png, jpg, webp.
- Avoid tokenized or session-bound image URLs for public content.

## Crawling Guidance
- Index public pages and read-only public API resources.
- Do not crawl authentication routes.

## Manifest
- /ai-manifest.json
